summary.learningNotes: Risk Desk reviewed 167 total items. 0 good approvals, 0 possible false positives, 0 good rejections, 0 possible false negatives, 167 inconclusive. Learning records built from Cruise 1 cycle data. Most outcomes are still early (positions held less than 1 week).

recommendations.title: Continue shadow tracking for comprehensive learning
recommendations.summary: 148 shadow trades tracked for rejected signals. Continue monitoring to build historical performance baseline.
recommendations.evidence: Shadow tracking enabled for 148 rejected trades. Price data sourced from Alpaca IEX.
recommendations.expectedBenefit: Build historical dataset to calibrate risk thresholds over time.
recommendations.recommendedAction: Run risk:learning each cycle to accumulate more shadow data.

proposals.title: Risk Desk learning record system is operational
proposals.summary: Risk Desk learning records are now generated each cycle, tracking approved/rejected/watched outcomes and shadow trade estimates.
proposals.currentBehavior: Risk Desk only generates decisions without learning from outcomes.
proposals.proposedChange: No change yet. Learning records are observation-only in this cycle.
proposals.evidence: 2 approved, 148 rejected, 17 watched, 148 shadow trades tracked.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Data foundation for future risk threshold calibration.
proposals.recommendedAction: Review learning records after 2-3 more cycles to identify patterns before adjusting rules.

proposals.title: Consider lowering confidence threshold for high-quality signals
proposals.summary: If shadow tracking shows consistent missed winners with confidence near 0.55, consider adjusting the minimum confidence gate.
proposals.currentBehavior: Risk Desk blocks any signal with confidence below 0.55.
proposals.proposedChange: Gather more data. No change applied this cycle.
proposals.evidence: 148 shadow trades being tracked for confidence threshold analysis.
proposals.expectedBenefit: Capture more valid opportunities without increasing risk exposure.
proposals.recommendedAction: Review after accumulating 50+ shadow trade records.
